title: dagr.graph@1
description: The C20 graph artifact: a pipeline's structure, obtainable without executing it. A single canonical JSON document (T4 §2) with a header (schema version, tool version, generation time, pipeline identity, build provenance, both fingerprint hashes + algorithm version) plus per-node and per-edge descriptions. Published by T39 (ticket 050). Schema evolution is additive-only within a version (T0.10): no object sets additionalProperties:false, so unknown future fields validate. The `type_name` field is reserved as an INFORMATIONAL DEBUG field only (std::any::type_name is unstable across compilers) and is never identity — stable author-declared names are.

generated_at.description: Generation time. Excluded from byte-identity comparison (C20/T4 §6); everything else is fixed per binary.

build_provenance.description: Build provenance embedded at build time (C20): tool version, git commit, lockfile hash.

fingerprint_structural.description: The structural fingerprint (C21) — reserved here; computing it is T41. A version-prefixed hash string.

fingerprint_policy.description: The policy hash (C21) — reserved here; computing it is T41.

fingerprint_algorithm_version.description: The versioned fingerprint algorithm identifier (C21/T0.10): a mismatch reads as 'cannot compare', never a false difference.

node.description: One node: name, group, stable task name, stable input/output type names, execution class, complete effective policy, declared resource requirements, dependency list. `type_name` is an OPTIONAL informational debug field only; it can never stand in for the required stable `output_type_name`.

task_name.description: The author-declared stable task name (C20). Uniqueness checked at assembly.

output_type_name.description: Author-declared stable output type name (C20). REQUIRED identity; never `type_name`.

policy.description: The COMPLETE effective policy (C5), defaults written out — retries, timeout, cost, execution class, durability flag (T0.8), trigger rule.

dependencies.description: Names of nodes this node depends on.

type_name.description: RESERVED informational debug field (std::any::type_name). Never identity, never in the fingerprint (C20). Optional and free-form.

edge.description: One edge, tagged data-vs-ordering. A DATA edge carries the stable name of the type it carries; an ORDERING edge carries no type.

then.description: A data edge MUST carry the stable name of the type carried (C20).
